title: habenaria rupestris
intro: Habenaria rupestris, also known as the terrestrial orchid, is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family (Orchidaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Habenaria rupestris include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by drying and processing the leaves and roots, which can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures.
